description: A student reports that the light in their dorm room is not working.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and their dorm room number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the student's identity and location.

nodes.task_description: Create a maintenance work order in the facilities management system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates a work order detailing the issue ('light out').

nodes.task_description: Provide the student with the work order number and the standard response time for non-emergency requests.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the next steps and timeline.
